title: Ora Kannaala Lyrics Udhayam NH4 Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Movie: Udhayam NH4
Singer: Gaana Bala
Music: GV Prakash Kumar
Lyrics: Gaana Bala		 Other Songs Lyrics
Ora Kannala
Yaaro Ivan
Maalai Pon Maalai
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words

Ora kannaala enna oram katturaa
Jaada Kaatiye romba vaati vadhaikuraa
vaana villaatam vandhu yetti paakuraa
valachi poten da oru sokku figurada

Ariyaa vayasula, alava saisula
anna nada nadandhu varraa kadalu mannula
naalu molam road-ula nada oru dhinusula
satham pottu signal tharraa velli kolusula

Light house-u velachathapola kaaturaada jaalam
Manasukulla pulli vachi poduraada kolam

Maadi veetula oru pulli maanudaa
kedachi pochudaa naan ketta peiece-u da
velli kolusula pudhu satham pottuthaan
chinna manasthaan ava valachu pottuta

Kadhal pannum sokkula
kattu maram gapula
kaasimedu kadalu manula veedu katturaa
alayulaa kadula thudupula padagula
aadu puli aatam thaaney aadi kaaturaa

Adaki pudikka mudiyaadha vangakadal kudhira
Octopus meena pola vandhutaada yedhira

Ora kannaala enna oram katturaa
Jaada Kaatiye romba vaati vadhaikuraa
vaana villaatam vandhu yetti paakuraa
valachi poten da oru sokku figurada

Maayakannaala prabhuva mayaki paathava
maatti thavikuraa ippa veetu siraiyula
andha figaru mogathathaan
ivan paaka mudiyala
ava velli kulusula ippa satham ketkala

Paasamennum valayila maatikittu thavikuraa
aadharavaa avaluku angae yaarumillada
naalu peru serndhutaa
rendu pera pirichitaa
kaadhal enna kaatriniley
kalaindhu pogumaa

Soagatha nee kaatulathaan
paraka vidu nanbaa
Un machaan serthu vappaan nee beera
kudi thembaa

English Translation
I tried my best :)
[english lyric]

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ora Kannaala'?

The song 'Ora Kannaala' expresses deep emotions related to love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Udhayam NH4'?

In Udhayam NH4, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's emotional struggles and romantic feelings.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Gaana Bala, and the music is composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was 'Ora Kannaala' released?

'Ora Kannaala' was released on April 4, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ora Kannaala', the protagonist navigates the complexities of love, reflecting on the joys and sorrows that come with it. The song's soothing melody and poignant lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced love's ups and downs. Set against the backdrop of Udhayam NH4, this track beautifully encapsulates the emotional turmoil faced by the characters. Overall, it serves as a heartfelt reminder of the bittersweet nature of romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ora Kannaala from Udhayam NH4 is a captivating melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Gaana Bala's soulful rendition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. The unique blend of heartfelt lyrics and soothing music makes it a must-listen for fans of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: What is this that I am feeling? The wind is blowing strongly, and the sky is coming down. I have put on a show, like a puppet figure.
In this age, everything is happening. The roads are filled with noise, and signals are being given. It's like a festival in the city.
Like a lighthouse shining, there is a net. In my heart, I am placing a small dot, creating a pattern.
In the house, there is a small person. Did he get caught? I heard a piece of news that a new sound has come, and a little heart has been placed.
In the love-filled atmosphere, there is a gap. The house is being built in the sea, and the game of the tiger is being played.
It cannot be caught easily, like a horse in the sea. An octopus fish has come, what is this?
What is this that I am feeling? The wind is blowing strongly, and the sky is coming down. I have put on a show, like a puppet figure.
With a magical eye, the Lord is enchanting. Now, in the house, that figure is not visible. I cannot hear the sound now.
In the circle of love, it is being twisted. There is no one there for her. Four people have come together, and two have separated. Will love blend into the wind?
You are the one who is beautiful, let it go, my friend. You are my buddy, and you will be with me.
